description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular metallic head with beveled edges and a dark, matte finish. The head is adorned with a prominent, light blue triquetra symbol on its broad faces and a circular blue pattern on the top surface, giving it a distinctive, almost mythical appearance. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a brown, segmented grip that appears to be made of wood or leather, and ends with a black wrist strap for secure handling. The hammer's head shows some subtle surface wear, with speckled marks suggesting light use or intentional weathering for aesthetic effect. The overall design is robust and heavy-duty, suitable for both display and practical use. The combination of metallic and organic materials, along with the decorative symbols, makes this hammer stand out as both a functional tool and a statement piece.
description: A robust hammer with a large, dark metallic head featuring blue symbols and a brown, segmented handle with a wrist strap. The head has beveled edges and subtle wear, giving it a distinctive, weathered look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad face of the hammer head with a prominent blue triquetra symbol and the full length of the handle with the wrist strap visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the narrow edge of the hammer head, showing the beveled corners and the circular blue pattern on the top surface.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the opposite broad face with another blue triquetra symbol and the handle with strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other narrow edge and the top circular blue pattern.
attribute_handle_type: Brown segmented handle, likely wood or leather-wrapped, straight with a black synthetic wrist strap for grip enhancement.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges, flat striking faces, and decorative blue symbols; no claws or peens.
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: Subtle speckled wear marks on the hammer head, no major damage visible.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Black wrist strap attached to the handle.
